name: fa01_stage1_sidecar_map_smoke_20260527

map_definitions.topology_anchor_luma: Raw Lab-L luma; keeps raw topology as the primary edge-distribution anchor.
map_definitions.color_compensation_magnitude: Robust-normalized Lab ab magnitude between BPH and raw; highlights where gray-pixel/BPH color formation acts.
map_definitions.frequency_detail_evidence: Robust-normalized absolute luma difference between IMF1Ray and BPH; captures IMF/frequency detail evidence.
map_definitions.contrast_visibility_evidence: Robust-normalized max luma change from RGHS/CLAHE against BPH; captures contrast and local-visibility evidence.
map_definitions.fusion_luma_delta_risk: Robust-normalized absolute luma difference between Final and raw; marks where direct replacement changes raw topology.
map_definitions.background_false_edge_risk: Final-gradient gain in weak raw-gradient regions, weighted by Final-vs-raw luma delta; flags possible new background edges.
map_definitions.weak_boundary_support: Frequency detail retained outside background-risk regions; sidecar signal for weak-boundary support.

scope: no-training sidecar export smoke; no detector run; no candidate gate
